overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character riding an elevator down to a garage entrance. The clip features a continuous descent through a metallic elevator shaft with brass fixtures and warm artificial lighting. The player's hands with black nail polish are visible against the walls initially before the view focuses on the structural elements below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator shaft descending to parking garage

agents.ego_description: riding the elevator downward with hands pressed against the metallic side walls, then releasing them as the descent continues toward the garage level

entered.detail: wall-mounted metallic panel with illuminated floor selection buttons arranged in a grid
circular brass door knobs with reflective golden surfaces mounted on the elevator doors
dark polished metal wall paneling with vertical seams and warm reflections
dark polished metal wall paneling with vertical seams and warm reflections
structural steel beams and cross-bracing visible at the bottom of the elevator shaft
metal grid flooring marking the bottom level of the shaft near the garage entrance

segments.scene_description: The player character descends in an elevator toward a garage entrance, viewing the polished metallic interior walls and brass fixtures. Hands with black nail polish are visible pressed against the side walls initially before moving out of frame. The steady descent reveals the structural steel framework and metal grate flooring at the bottom of the shaft, illuminated by warm artificial lighting throughout the enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent through a metallic elevator shaft that transitions from a close-up view of the interior to a wide perspective of the structural depths below. It begins with the camera positioned near polished metallic walls and brass fixtures, where hands with black nail polish are briefly visible pressed against the sides. As the elevator drops, the hands move out of frame, shifting the focus toward the open space of the shaft. The view then expands to reveal the industrial steel framework and metal grate flooring approaching at the bottom. Finally, the scene settles on the garage entrance, all bathed in a consistent, warm artificial glow.
